page_metadata.biotools__summary: The software simulates biochemical systems at the mesoscopic scale of interaction based on the stochastic model of reaction-diffusion systems, in which the diffusion coefficients are function of the local concentration, viscosity and frictional forces.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The software simulates biochemical systems at the mesoscopic scale of interaction based on the stochastic model of reaction-diffusion systems, in which the diffusion coefficients are function of the local concentration, viscosity and frictional forces.
